name: thegn-acp-extension
description: thegn's pi package: the ACP bridge extension (thegn-acp.ts) + the thegn-house skill. pi (>=0.80) bundles @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent and resolves it for the extension at load time, so NO install is required to run; the dependency is declared only for editor type-checking. By default the extension is additive — it observes via session/update, routes the model via the proxy, and exposes thegn's house tools via MCP-over-ACP, leaving pi's built-in tools in-process. Under THEGN_BOUNCER=1 it also overrides bash/read/edit/write to route over ACP so thegn runs them in a sealed sandbox behind an allow/deny gate, and (when THEGN_PROXY_UNIX is set) routes the model proxy over a bind-mounted unix socket for a full network seal.
